summary: Tested backend /api/health and /api/llm/proxy + frontend Input/Interview e2e flow. 4/5 backend tests pass; gemini emergent proxy fails because 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite' is not accepted by emergentintegrations/litellm. Frontend renders correctly, e2e flow works end-to-end using emergent-openai provider (questions generated, live feedback rendered, follow-up question received).

critical.issue: Returns 502. emergentintegrations LlmChat with .with_model('gemini','gemini-2.5-flash-lite') is rejected by litellm: 'Invalid model name passed in model=gemini/gemini-2.5-flash-lite'. Try a supported model like 'gemini-2.0-flash' or 'gemini-2.5-flash' (without -lite suffix), or check Emergent universal key supported model list.

integration_issues.issue: Selecting 'Emergent Universal Key · Gemini' will fail because backend /api/llm/proxy returns 502 for provider=gemini (see backend critical). Frontend itself is wired correctly; only blocked by backend model-name bug.

action_items: Update /app/backend/server.py llm_proxy: change Gemini model id from 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite' to a model accepted by Emergent universal key (e.g. 'gemini-2.0-flash' or 'gemini-2.5-flash'). Verify supported model list before choosing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it's used inside llm_proxy exception handler (logger.exception). If an exception occurs before line 103 it would NameError. Move logger init above api_router.
Gemini emergent model 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite' is unsupported by current emergentintegrations/litellm — pick a verified model.
Pydantic LLMProxyRequest does not validate prompt non-empty; consider min_length=1.
InputScreen.js Field/StatBlock — small helper components in same file are fine; no split needed yet (<340 lines).
test_credentials: Not applicable (no auth in this app). EMERGENT_LLM_KEY already set in /app/backend/.env.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 1 known critical bug: emergent-gemini provider returns 502 due to invalid model id 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite'. OpenAI emergent path works (verified e2e via UI). After fix, re-run /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and re-test Emergent · Gemini flow on Input screen. Frontend Input → Interview navigation, live feedback panel, chat send, font controls all verified. Did not deeply test: Finish Interview → Results navigation (requires 8-10 questions × 2 answers), History screen, session reload persistence — main agent or next iteration should validate these.
rca of the issue: RCA for Gemini 502: server.py calls LlmChat(...).with_model('gemini','gemini-2.5-flash-lite'). emergentintegrations routes via litellm which validates the model id against OpenAI-compatible model list returned by Emergent's /v1/models endpoint. Error: 'Invalid model name passed in model=gemini/gemini-2.5-flash-lite'. Reproduction: POST /api/llm/proxy {provider:'gemini', prompt:'hi'} → 502. Mitigation: change model to a supported Gemini variant (e.g. 'gemini-2.5-flash' or 'gemini-2.0-flash'); confirm via Emergent key's supported model list.
